Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content is entirely focused on Japanese grammar and communication, with no mention of energy sources or consumption.

evidence: 権力...が発話の自然さに与える影響

Climate Action.reason: The course focuses on linguistics, with no relevance to climate change, environmental hazards, or policy integration for climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content is entirely focused on Japanese grammar and communication, with no mention of marine life or ocean conservation.
